added.title: The Arrival
added.description: As the Workers' District faces extreme strain and Elu's political climate worsens, Iyanu intensifies her training with Mama Sewa while two formidable military forces converge on the Riverlands Settlement to capture her.

added.title: The Source Part II
added.description: Iyanu reaches The Source and faces a devastating choice about her destiny. As Elu teeters on the brink of destruction from the Corrupt, Iyanu's allies fight a final battle against Chancellor Nuro and the Fallen One.

added.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
added.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

added.title: Taking it to the Rim Reaper
added.description: Things get wet, wild and gross when the Campers play waterslide basketball!

added.title: You Poor Saps
added.description: Tensions run high in this week's challenge when the Campers find themselves in a sticky situation.

added.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
added.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.

added.title: The Wheel of Vomit
added.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

added.title: Paddle Field Earth
added.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

added.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
added.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

added.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
added.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

added.title: Caved by the Bell
added.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

added.title: Magma Cum Laude
added.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

added.title: Panda's Date
added.description: When a vendor at the Farmer's Market (LUCY) sticks Panda with an EpiPen reviving him after an allergic reaction, Panda comes to in the arms of his dream girl. Panda tries to woo this woman of his dreams but his brothers and his own insecurities get in the way.

added.title: Everyday Bears
added.description: It's a normal day for the Bears. This means that Ice gets in a fight with a Roomba, Panda's life gets turned upside down when a mouse invades his room and Grizz gets stuck in a tree. You know, everyday stuff for a bear.

added.title: Burrito
added.description: Grizz likes Burritos. A lot. So much so that after a restaurant makes a Bear-Sized Burrito, Grizz can't bring himself to eat such a majestic work of art. He carries the burrito everywhere making it a new and increasingly smelly part of his life.

added.title: Primal
added.description: Have the Bears lost their survival instincts by living in the modern world? Grizz wants to know so he purposefully gets the Bears lost in the deep forest.

added.title: Jean Jacket
added.description: The Bears find a bedazzled jean jacket in a dumpster. It's just about the coolest thing they've ever seen and seems to make the wearer of the jacket extremely lucky. But after the Bears fight over who gets control of the jacket, they have to consider that their denim blessing has become a curse.

added.title: Nom Nom
added.description: When Nom Nom shows up on the Bears' doorstep, disheveled and deposed from his spot as cutest internet star ever after a recent meltdown, he enlists the Bears to help him regain his title.

added.title: Shush Ninjas
added.description: The Bears are fed up with the decay of etiquette at today's theaters. The Bears take it upon themselves to be the police of the theater, sneaking up like ninjas to shush people who ruin the movie for others with their bad manners.

added.title: My Clique
added.description: Chloe, a child prodigy, finds it difficult to connect with her much older classmates. The Bears take her under their wing and show her how to make great college friends.

added.title: Charlie
added.description: You know that one annoying friend who just can't get the hint? That's Charlie, and he's Bigfoot. The Bears meet him when Charlie signs up on a home-sharing website to spend a weekend with the Bears. Charlie is the worst possible house guest for the Bears and nearly destroys their house.

added.title: Brother Up
added.description: After Panda stumbles and accidentally scares a pack of wolves away in the process, the hierarchy of the Bears is disrupted. Suddenly, Panda has become the alpha bear, and he and Grizz have to deal with the consequences of an emotional Panda being the leader of the three Bears.

added.title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 1: Susie's Ark
added.description: When Susie learns magic is beginning to disappear from New York, she tries to lead all the magical creatures to safety.

added.title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 2: Ghost Baby Jabberwock
added.description: Susie, Ramona, and Barb team up in frozen time to see what's threatening magic.

added.title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 3: Meet Me in Massachusetts
added.description: Susie and Ramona train a gaggle of witches until they have a full coven.

added.title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 4: Witches in the City
added.description: Ramona sends Susie back to New York in search of new magical creatures.

added.title: Puddle and the King Chapter 1: Honey Moondog
added.description: The King leaves Hedgehog and Oscar in charge of the kingdom while he and Puddle are away - their only duty is to carry out the Swan-Upping.
